highlights.title: CrowdStrike raises FY guidance after AI contract wins
highlights.summary: FY26 revenue guidance raised $180M after multi-year AI sensor deal.
highlights.suggested_copy: CRWD just raised FY guidance on the back of a big AI federal deal. Watch the open tomorrow.

highlights.title: Coinbase hires ex-CFTC attorney as Chief Policy Officer
highlights.summary: New hire to lead Washington policy shop; signals offensive move in US regulation.
highlights.suggested_copy: COIN beefing up DC firepower—ex-CFTC counsel now leading policy.
